originalTitle: Kenya to charge students with murder over deadly school fire
title: Kenya to charge students with murder over deadly school fire
content: Sixteen pupils, aged between 15 and 18, died when a fire broke out in a dormitory at Utumishi Girls' School last month.

originalTitle: Sexual violence increasingly used as 'weapon of war' in Sudan, UN says
title: Sexual violence increasingly used as 'weapon of war' in Sudan, UN says
content: The scale and brutality of the sexual attacks is unprecedented and aimed at terrorising communities, the UN says.

originalTitle: Who is the African World Cup goalscorer older than Ronaldo and Messi?
title: Who is the African World Cup goalscorer older than Ronaldo and Messi?
content: While Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi appear to be in a personal battle to rewrite the World Cup record books, there is one landmark that appears beyond them.

originalTitle: Thousands feared dead as twin earthquakes cause devastation across Venezuel
title: Thousands feared dead as twin earthquakes cause devastation across Venezuel
content: Thousands feared dead as twin earthquakes cause devastation across Venezuela.

originalTitle: Mexico triumph 3-0 to eliminate Czechia and win all three World Cup matches
title: Mexico triumph 3-0 to eliminate Czechia and win all three World Cup matches
content: Mateo Chavez opened the scoring in the 55th minute, and Julian Quinones scored his second goal of the tournament in the 61st.

originalTitle: Iranians mark first Ashura since Khamenei’s killing in the US-Iran war
title: Iranians mark first Ashura since Khamenei’s killing in the US-Iran war
content: Thousands gathered in Tehran on the eve of Ashura, the first since the killing of Iranian supreme leader Ali Khamenei.

originalTitle: 'Strongest quake I've ever felt' - Venezuelans describe panic
title: 'Strongest quake I've ever felt' - Venezuelans describe panic
content: Two quakes hit the capital seconds apart, the first at a magnitude of 7.2 and the second at 7.5.

originalTitle: France, UK and Spain see record temperatures as heatwave grips western Europe
title: France, UK and Spain see record temperatures as heatwave grips western Europe
content: Tens of millions of people are grappling with punishing temperatures, which have led to red heat alerts across the continent.

originalTitle: Trump asks Congress for $87bn, mostly for 'urgent' Iran war costs
title: Trump asks Congress for $87bn, mostly for 'urgent' Iran war costs
content: But the budget faces an uphill battle, coming a day after lawmakers rebuked Trump's military action.

originalTitle: Vinicius Jr stops fun and leaves Scots down... but are they out?
title: Vinicius Jr stops fun and leaves Scots down... but are they out?
content: Scotland's party stops at the hands of Brazil in Miami, but might they still find themselves in the last 32?

originalTitle: 'Think we're going home' - Clarke & McGinn rue Scotland mistakes
title: 'Think we're going home' - Clarke & McGinn rue Scotland mistakes
content: Scotland will have to wait until potentially the early hours of Sunday to find out if their World Cup campaign will continue, but midfielder John McGinn suspects that is "unlikely" and head coach Steve Clarke suspects they are "going home".

originalTitle: Scotland hopes on the brink following defeat against Brazil
title: Scotland hopes on the brink following defeat against Brazil
content: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup for the first time are in significant peril with calamitous defending allowed Brazil to win 3-0 in Miami and finish top of Group C.
